name: all_rams
short_description: Get a list of ram cells in the current design
full_help:
all_rams

Description: 
Get a list of ram cells in the current design

Syntax: 
all_rams  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
list of ram cell objects

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
